properties.name: idempotent.aws.region
properties.description: AWS region for the default DynamoDbClient when the application does not define one.

properties.name: idempotent.aws.access-key
properties.description: Optional static access key used with a custom DynamoDB endpoint.

properties.name: idempotent.aws.access-secret
properties.description: Optional static access secret used with a custom DynamoDB endpoint.

properties.name: idempotent.dynamodb.enabled
properties.description: Whether the DynamoDB idempotent store auto-configuration is active.

properties.name: idempotent.dynamodb.endpoint
properties.description: Optional endpoint override for local/test DynamoDB.

properties.name: idempotent.dynamodb.table-create
properties.description: Whether to create the DynamoDB table automatically on startup.

properties.name: idempotent.dynamodb.ttl-enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable DynamoDB TTL on the expiresAtEpochSeconds attribute at startup.

properties.name: idempotent.dynamodb.table-name
properties.description: The name of the DynamoDB table used for storing idempotent data.
